name: get
_note: photos.get returns ONE photo row from the live user_photos table. The owner sees any of their own photos; non-owners only see a photo that has been shared public (a private photo of another user reports not_found so its existence is not disclosed). A missing id rejects missing_id; an unknown id rejects not_found. The assassin's internal owner actor owns no photos, so an arbitrary id returns not_found — never no_db.
